abilities.name: 도주
abilities.description: 야생 포켓몬으로부터 반드시 도망칠 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.
